title: Looted: Mob Drops
description: Makes mobs drop loot bags from the Looted mod.
body:
![Looted: Mob Drops Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48cfb1983207be3106de0b8ce81bf97e19331ae9.png)

> [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/QDSYsQzrj2) to report bugs, suggest mods or features, or to simply chat.

Looted: Mob Drops is a data pack that makes the loot bags from [Looted](https://modrinth.com/mod/looted) drop from mobs.

# 💰 Content
Each mob has a 5% chance of dropping a loot bag.
- Common Loot Bags have a drop weight of 100.
- Uncommon Loot Bags have a drop weight of 25.
- Rare Loot Bags have a drop weight of 8.
- Epic Loot Bags have a drop weight of 2.

There are a few exceptions:
- Vanilla: Ravagers and Elder Guardians can only drop Uncommon, Rare and Epic Loot Bags, and have a 25% chance to do so.
- Vanilla: The Wither, Ender Dragon and Warden all drop 1-3 Epic Loot Bags upon death.

# ☕ Mod Support
We plan to add support for as many mods as possible in the future. Currently, the data pack supports the following environments and mods:
- Vanilla
